package.name: genie_sim_planning
package.description:
Python tooling and scripts for the GenieSim chassis pipeline (teleop, navigation, follow_trajectory). The C++ four-wheel-steering servo and its supporting plugins/solvers/tracking-differentiator have moved to genie_sim_controllers (ros2_control controller form). This package is slated for further refactor.
Includes LQR / discrete Riccati helpers adapted from Atsushi Sakai's PythonRobotics (MIT-licensed) — see THIRD_PARTY_LICENSES.md for the full attribution.
